notes: Strict comparison target covers a captured `customer(id:)` detail slice for directly related customer sub-resource reads that the current conformance credential can access: addresses, addressesV2, companyContactProfiles, orders, events, singular metafield, metafields, and lastOrder. Store credit accounts, payment methods, and subscription contracts are documented deferrals because this credential returned field-level ACCESS_DENIED for those nested reads. Local snapshot/staged reads intentionally model the safe absent-data branch for unsupported nested records instead of hydrating non-empty order/event/address graphs in this issue.
